details.productUrlName: Imoti Celebrant of Bounty Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom of your library in a random order.)
Spells you cast with mana value 6 or greater have cascade.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
